SCTNG_PRN_ADMSN_CD O0110D3A Therapies: Suctioning - As Needed (Admission) CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident received as needed suctioning days one through three (on admission) of becoming a resident of the facility. 0=No
1=Yes effective 10/01/2023
978 SCTNG_PRN_DSCHRG_CD SCTNG_PRN_DSCHRG_CD O0110D3C Therapies: Suctioning - As Needed (Discharge) CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident received as needed suctioning in the last three days of their
